name: fifa2026-platform
description: FIFA 2026 World Cup Simulator & Fantasy Prediction League — full-stack TypeScript monorepo

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @fifa/shared && npm run build -w @fifa/sim-engine && npm run build -w @fifa/db
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.setup: npm run build:packages && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm run test -w @fifa/sim-engine && npm run test -w @fifa/shared && npm run test:e2e -w @fifa/api
